description: Print information about blocks. If < range > is not supplied, the requested information is listed for all blocks in the current building blocks set.
notes: Requires a current building-blocks set: run 'building-blocks set create <name>' then 'building-blocks set select <name>' before any block/edge/face/point operation; otherwise FLAC rejects the command with 'Unused extra parameter'.

keywords.name: edges
keywords.description: Edge IDs for each block are listed.

keywords.name: extra
keywords.description: FISH extra information printed. A valid index i must be supplied.

keywords.name: faces
keywords.description: Face IDs for each block are listed.

keywords.name: information
keywords.description: Comprehensive information is listed, including groups, extras, degeneracy, and zone multiplier.

keywords.name: nodes
keywords.description: Node IDs for each block are listed.

keywords.name: status
keywords.description: Validation status for each block is listed.
